title: Evangelion 222 BD to be released March 31 in Italy
display_title: Evangelion 222 BD to be released March 31 in Italy
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 2.22 BD to be released March 31 in Italy             Quote Post by Tetsuo87 » Thu Apr 01, 2010 2:15 pm Today, on the facebook page of "Dynit", the underwater studio that produces italian version of evangelion in Italy, (the equivalent of Funanimation), announced the releases of this month and with great surprise .. [URL=http://img143.imageshack.us/i/capture333.png/] [/URL] Here you can see the page with the ad. just click on "BluRay Evangelion: 2.22 You Can (Not) Advance" to get all the info: press release (in Italian) or press release (in English) Here is the Dynit Facebook page: Facebook Page Bye and sorry my english edit: news about the date of distribution of BluRay in Italy (seriously): [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=301857#301857[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Heromaster111 » Thu Apr 01, 2010 2:43 pm All the info is a picture from Finding Nemo lol

[]:             Quote Post by Tetsuo87 » Thu Apr 01, 2010 2:47 pm fantastic April Fool

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Fri Apr 02, 2010 12:31 am I was about to say, "LOLWTF Italy gets Eva 2.22 before Japan." Then I realized it was still April Fools.

Article: Evangelion 222 BD to be released March 31 in Italy
[]: Evangelion 2.22 BD to be released March 31 in Italy             Quote Post by Tetsuo87 » Thu Apr 01, 2010 2:15 pm Today, on the facebook page of "Dynit", the underwater studio that produces italian version of evangelion in Italy, (the equivalent of Funanimation), announced the releases of this month and with great surprise .. [URL=http://img143.imageshack.us/i/capture333.png/] [/URL] Here you can see the page with the ad. just click on "BluRay Evangelion: 2.22 You Can (Not) Advance" to get all the info: press release (in Italian) or press release (in English) Here is the Dynit Facebook page: Facebook Page Bye and sorry my english edit: news about the date of distribution of BluRay in Italy (seriously): [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=301857#301857[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Tetsuo87 » Thu Apr 01, 2010 2:47 pm fantastic April Fool
